ir_specs.statement: scope SCOPE_VALUE the scope of the area where this address is valid.

ir_specs.statement: When it expires, the address is no longer used for new outgoing connections.

ir_specs.statement: home (IPv6 only) designates this address the "home address" as defined in RFC 6275.
